meaning: adj.有蠕虫的,虫多的,虫蛀的
examples: I ate some, though I had to eat around the wormy parts.
Wormy mothers, healthy babies: case closed or conundrum?
The beams were wormy and the chains rusted and the pillars green with mold.
The tortoise raised its wormy head and fixed him with an old eye above its nostriled beak.
